name: figma-mcp-go
description: Figma MCP server with full read/write access via plugin bridge — no API token, no rate limits. 58 tools for design automation: styles, variables, components, prototypes, and content.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Full current page tree

tools.name: get_metadata
tools.description: File name, pages, current page

tools.name: get_pages
tools.description: All pages (IDs + names)

tools.name: get_selection
tools.description: Currently selected nodes

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Single node by ID

tools.name: get_nodes_info
tools.description: Multiple nodes by ID list

tools.name: get_design_context
tools.description: Depth-limited tree with detail level and component deduplication

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Find nodes by name/type within a subtree

tools.name: scan_text_nodes
tools.description: All TEXT nodes in a subtree

tools.name: scan_nodes_by_types
tools.description: Nodes matching type list in subtree

tools.name: get_viewport
tools.description: Current viewport center, zoom, and bounds

tools.name: get_styles
tools.description: Paint, text, effect, grid styles

tools.name: get_variable_defs
tools.description: Variable collections and values

tools.name: get_local_components
tools.description: All components and component sets with variant properties

tools.name: get_annotations
tools.description: Dev-mode annotations

tools.name: get_fonts
tools.description: All fonts used in current page, sorted by frequency

tools.name: get_reactions
tools.description: Prototype/interaction reactions on a node

tools.name: get_screenshot
tools.description: Base64 image of node(s)

tools.name: save_screenshots
tools.description: Write screenshots to disk

tools.name: export_frames_to_pdf
tools.description: Export multiple frames as a single multi-page PDF

tools.name: create_frame
tools.description: Create a frame with optional auto-layout and fill

tools.name: create_rectangle
tools.description: Create a rectangle with optional fill and corner radius

tools.name: create_ellipse
tools.description: Create an ellipse or circle

tools.name: create_text
tools.description: Create a text node

tools.name: import_image
tools.description: Import a base64 image into Figma

tools.name: set_text
tools.description: Update text content of an existing text node

tools.name: set_fills
tools.description: Set solid fill color on a node

tools.name: set_strokes
tools.description: Set solid stroke color and weight on a node

tools.name: move_nodes
tools.description: Move nodes to an absolute x/y position

tools.name: resize_nodes
tools.description: Resize nodes by width and/or height

tools.name: rename_node
tools.description: Rename a node

tools.name: clone_node
tools.description: Clone a node with optional repositioning or reparenting

tools.name: set_auto_layout
tools.description: Set or update auto-layout properties on a frame

tools.name: set_corner_radius
tools.description: Set corner radius on a node

tools.name: set_opacity
tools.description: Set opacity on a node

tools.name: group_nodes
tools.description: Group nodes together

tools.name: ungroup_nodes
tools.description: Ungroup a group node

tools.name: delete_nodes
tools.description: Delete one or more nodes permanently

tools.name: set_reactions
tools.description: Set prototype reactions on a node

tools.name: remove_reactions
tools.description: Remove reactions from a node

tools.name: create_component
tools.description: Create a component from a node

tools.name: swap_component
tools.description: Swap a component instance to a different component

tools.name: detach_instance
tools.description: Detach a component instance

tools.name: apply_style_to_node
tools.description: Apply a style to a node

tools.name: create_paint_style
tools.description: Create a named paint style

tools.name: create_text_style
tools.description: Create a named text style

tools.name: create_effect_style
tools.description: Create a named effect style

tools.name: create_grid_style
tools.description: Create a named layout grid style

tools.name: update_paint_style
tools.description: Rename or recolor an existing paint style

tools.name: delete_style
tools.description: Delete a style by ID

tools.name: create_variable_collection
tools.description: Create a new local variable collection

tools.name: add_variable_mode
tools.description: Add a new mode to an existing variable collection

tools.name: create_variable
tools.description: Create a variable in a collection

tools.name: set_variable_value
tools.description: Set a variable's value for a specific mode

tools.name: bind_variable_to_node
tools.description: Bind a variable to a node property

tools.name: delete_variable
tools.description: Delete a variable or entire collection

tools.name: navigate_to_page
tools.description: Navigate to a page by ID or name

tools.name: export_tokens
tools.description: Export design tokens
